news.title: Trump pledges more Iran attacks, saying U.S. will be 'attacking them very hard'
news.summary: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.

news.title: Here's the inflation breakdown for May 2026 — in one chart
news.summary: Inflation jumped to a three-year high in May as the Iran war continued to fuel higher energy prices. In May, inflation jumped to an all-time high of 2.7 percent.

news.title: Amazon trucking expansion sparks freight stock sell-off
news.summary: Amazon has been spinning out more of its in-house logistics offerings for others to access. The move poses a growing threat to industry incumbents.

news.title: Trump signs $70 billion immigration funding bill after months of delay
news.summary: The $70 billion package will fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection through the end of President Donald Trump's term. The package will also fund the U.S. Marshals Service.

news.title: Bill Gates tells House panel 'I should have never met' with Jeffrey Epstein
news.summary: Gates reportedly prepared for his testimony with the help of Jake Greenberg, who previously was the Oversight committee's chief investigations counsel. Gates is expected to testify before the House Oversight Committee on Thursday.

news.title: ‘This would be a one-time event’: How can I take extra money from my 401(k) without triggering higher Medicare premiums?
news.summary: “I generally withdraw money from my traditional 401(k) for projects, larger expenses and sometimes just to stay ahead on upcoming bills,” she says.

news.title: My 20-year-old son wanted his first credit card. I told him to skip the most obvious advice and do these 4 things instead.
news.summary: A credit-building shortcut that many parents overlook. Plus, a way to get a mortgage without breaking the bank's rules. And a way for you to get your first job without breaking any rules.

news.title: SpaceX is launching a historic IPO — but its biggest risk has nothing to do with rockets
news.summary: Elon Musk admits he “cannot predict’ when his massive venture will make money. Starlink revenue tops $11 billion.

news.title: Social Security could face an automatic 22% cut in 2032. These 4 moves will protect your retirement.
news.summary: The countdown to insolvency is accelerating — and the rules of retirement planning just broke. The rules of planning for the future have never been more complex.

news.title: Social Security’s COLA could be 4.7% in 2027 as inflation hits the highest level in 3 years
news.summary: A total of 44% of older Americans depend on Social Security for all of their income, according to the Senior Citizens League. A total of 34% depend on Medicare for all their income.
